name: V26.3.1
body:
# Release Notes

## v26.3.1 — 2026-03-11

### Breaking Changes

#### Package Namespace Restructured

The import path has changed from the flat `aspose_cells` module to the `aspose.cells_foss` namespace package.

**Before (≤ v26.3.x):**

```python
from aspose_cells import Workbook
```

**After (v26.5.1+):**

```python
from aspose.cells_foss import Workbook
```

This aligns the package with the Aspose namespace convention and makes it consistent with the PyPI package name `aspose-cells-foss`. All public classes, enums, and helpers remain identical — only the import path changes.

**Migration steps:**

1. Upgrade the package:
   ```bash
   pip install --upgrade aspose-cells-foss
   ```
2. Replace all imports in your project:
   ```bash
   # Linux / macOS
   sed -i 's/from aspose_cells import/from aspose.cells_foss import/g' **/*.py

   # Windows PowerShell
   Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.py | ForEach-Object {
       (Get-Content $_.FullName) -replace 'from aspose_cells import', 'from aspose.cells_foss import' |
       Set-Content $_.FullName
   }
   ```

---

### Improvements

- **Examples**: All files in `examples/` updated to use the new `aspose.cells_foss` import path.
- **Package structure**: Source tree reorganised as a proper namespace package (`aspose/cells_foss/`) so that `import aspose` and `from aspose.cells_foss import …` both resolve correctly.

---

### Full Feature Set (unchanged from v26.3.0)

All features introduced in v26.3.0 are fully available:

| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| Charts | 16 chart types (Line, Bar, Pie, Area, Scatter, Waterfall, Combo, Stock, Surface, Radar, Treemap, Sunburst, Histogram, Funnel, Box & Whisker, Map) |
| Pictures | Embedded images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, TIFF) anchored between cells |
| Drawing Shapes | 30+ preset geometries with fill, line, text, and font formatting |
| Sparklines | LINE, COLUMN, WIN_LOSS types with full color customisation |
| Excel Tables | Structured ListObject tables with styles and auto-filter |
| Manual Page Breaks | Horizontal and vertical page breaks with add/remove/clear |
| Formula Evaluator | Basic formula evaluation for cells without cached values |
| Merge Cells | `merge` / `unmerge` with round-trip persistence |
| Print Area | `page_setup.print_area` persisted via defined names |
| Data Validation | Dropdown lists, number ranges, date, text length, custom rules |
| Conditional Formatting | Rules-based cell formatting |
| Hyperlinks | URL, email, file, and internal references |
| Comments | Rich-text comments with author |
| Auto-Filter | Filtering on data ranges |
| Protection | Workbook structure and worksheet cell protection |
| Encryption | AES password protection on save/open |
| Document Properties | Title, author, subject, and custom properties |
| CSV / JSON / Markdown | Multi-format export via `SaveFormat` enum |

name: V26.3.0
body:
# Release Notes

## v26.3.0 

### New Features

#### Charts
- Added `worksheet.charts` collection with support for **16 chart types**: Line, Bar (Column), Pie, Area, Scatter (XY), Waterfall, Combo, Stock, Surface (3D / Wireframe), Radar (Standard / Filled), Treemap, Sunburst, Histogram, Funnel, Box & Whisker, and Map.
- Charts are fully persisted to and restored from `.xlsx` files.
- Each chart exposes `title`, `n_series`, `show_legend`, `legend_position`, `category_data`, and axis configuration.
- Series support per-series color, marker, error bars, and secondary axis assignment.
- Combo charts support mixed sub-chart types (e.g., Bar + Line with a secondary value axis).
- Box & Whisker charts support `quartile_method`, `box_show_mean_line`, `box_show_mean_marker`, `box_show_inner_points`, `box_show_outlier_points`, and `box_gap_width`.
- Histogram charts support `histogram_bin_count`, `histogram_bin_size`, and `histogram_interval_closed`.

#### Pictures
- Added `worksheet.pictures` collection (`PictureCollection`).
- `pictures.add(image_path, upper_left_row, upper_left_column, lower_right_row, lower_right_column)` embeds any JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, or TIFF image anchored between two cells.
- `Picture` objects expose `image_bytes`, `image_extension`, `name`, `hyperlink_url`, `edit_as` (anchor mode), and `no_change_aspect`.
- Pictures are fully round-tripped through `.xlsx` files, preserving original relationship metadata.

#### Drawing Shapes
- Added `worksheet.shapes` collection (`ShapeCollection`).
- `shapes.add(MsoDrawingType, upper_left_row, upper_left_column, lower_right_row, lower_right_column)` creates a shape of any of **30+ preset geometries**: Rectangle, RoundedRectangle, Oval, Diamond, Triangle, RightTriangle, Parallelogram, Trapezoid, Hexagon, Octagon, Cross, Star4/5/6/7/8, RightArrow, LeftArrow, UpArrow, DownArrow, TextBox, Callout, Pentagon, Cloud, Heart, LightningBolt, SmileyFace, LeftRightArrow, UpDownArrow, Cube, and Bevel.
- `shapes.add_text_box(...)` creates a transparent, borderless text box.
- Each `Shape` exposes `fill` (`MsoFillFormat`), `line` (`MsoLineFormat`), `font` (`ShapeFont`), `text`, `text_horizontal_alignment`, `text_vertical_alignment`, `hyperlink`, and anchor offset properties.
- Shapes are fully persisted to and restored from the worksheet drawing part.

#### Sparklines
- Added `worksheet.sparkline_groups` collection (`SparklineGroupCollection`).
- Supports three sparkline types via `SparklineType` enum: `LINE`, `COLUMN`, and `WIN_LOSS`.
- `sparkline_groups.add(sparkline_type, data_range, is_vertical, location_range)` auto-populates individual sparklines from a data range and display range.
- Each `SparklineGroup` supports color customisation (`color_series`, `color_negative`, `color_high`, `color_low`, `color_first`, `color_last`, `color_markers`, `color_axis`), `display_empty_cells_as` (`GAP`, `ZERO`, `CONNECTED`), `show_high_point`, `show_low_point`, `show_first_point`, `show_last_point`, `show_markers`, and `line_weight`.
- Sparklines are stored in the worksheet `<extLst>` extension list (x14 namespace) and fully round-tripped.

#### Excel Tables (ListObject)
- Added `worksheet.tables` collection (`TableCollection`).
- `tables.add(start_row, start_col, end_row, end_col, has_headers, name)` and `tables.add_with_range(cell_range, name)` create structured ECMA-376 tables.
- Each `Table` exposes `name`, `display_name`, `ref`, `has_headers`, `show_totals_row`, `show_auto_filter`, `table_style_info`, and a `columns` list of `TableColumn` objects.
- `TableStyleInfo` supports `name` (e.g., `"TableStyleMedium9"`), `show_row_stripes`, `show_column_stripes`, `show_first_column`, and `show_last_column`.
- Tables are persisted as separate `xl/tables/tableN.xml` parts and fully round-tripped.

#### Manual Page Breaks
- Added `worksheet.horizontal_page_breaks` (`HorizontalPageBreakCollection`) and `worksheet.vertical_page_breaks` (`VerticalPageBreakCollection`).
- `add(row_or_cell)` / `remove(row_or_cell)` / `remove_at(index)` / `clear()` — all methods available in both snake_case and PascalCase.
- Accepts 0-based integer indices, column letter strings, or A1-style cell references.
- Page breaks are persisted to and restored from worksheet XML.

#### Formula Evaluator
- Added `FormulaEvaluator` class for evaluating basic cell formulas at read time for cells without cached values.
- Supported functions: `CONCATENATE`, `CONCAT`, `TEXT`, `IF`, `AND`, `OR`, `NOT`, `LEN`, `TRIM`, `UPPER`, `LOWER`.
- Resolves A1-style cell references, sheet-qualified references (`Sheet1!A1`), and workbook defined names.

#### Merge Cells
- Added `worksheet.cells.merge(first_row, first_col, total_rows, total_cols)` and `unmerge(first_row, first_col, total_rows, total_cols)`.
- Merged ranges are persisted to and restored from worksheet XML.

#### Print Area
- Added `worksheet.page_setup.print_area` property for getting and setting the worksheet print area as an A1-range string (e.g., `"A1:H40"`).
- Print area is persisted via the defined names mechanism in workbook XML.

---

### Improvements

- **`xml_loader.py` / `xml_saver.py`**: Extended to orchestrate the new chart, picture, shape, sparkline, and table sub-loaders and sub-savers.
- **`worksheet.py`**: Added `charts`, `pictures`, `shapes`, `sparkline_groups`, `tables`, `horizontal_page_breaks`, and `vertical_page_breaks` collection properties; added `_mark_drawing_dirty()` for coordinating picture and shape XML regeneration.
- **`cells.py`**: Added `merge` / `unmerge` / `SetHorizontalPageBreak` / `RemoveHorizontalPageBreak` helpers.
- **`csv_handler.py`**: Minor robustness improvements for edge-case cell values.
- **`xml_hyperlink_handler.py`**: Improved handling of hyperlink relationships during round-trips.
- **`xml_properties_loader.py` / `xml_properties_saver.py`**: Improved defined-name handling to support print area persistence.

---

### Documentation

- **`README.md`**: Updated with new features, corrected PyPI badge URLs, updated GitHub repository URLs, and added Quick Start examples for Charts, Pictures, Shapes, Sparklines, Tables, and Page Breaks.
- **`AGENTS.md`**: New developer guide for AI coding agents — covers project conventions, architecture, the Loader/Saver pattern, dual naming rules, and a step-by-step checklist for adding new features.
- **`llms.txt`**: New LLM-friendly quick reference covering the full public API surface with concise code examples.
- **`License/LICENSE.txt`**: Added MIT license text file.

---

### Examples Added

| File | Demonstrates |
|---|---|
| `examples/test_create_all_charts.py` | All 16 chart types created from scratch |
| `examples/test_create_picture.py` | Embedding a picture and reloading to verify |
| `examples/test_create_shape.py` | Workflow diagrams using multiple shape types and text boxes |
| `examples/test_create_sparkline.py` | Line, Column, and Win-Loss sparklines with color options |
| `examples/test_create_exceltable.py` | Single and multiple structured tables with custom styles |
| `examples/test_manual_page_breaks.py` | Adding, removing, and clearing row and column page breaks |
| `examples/test_merge_cells.py` | Merging ranges, saving, reloading, and unmerging |
| `examples/test_print_area.py` | Setting print area and verifying via save/load round-trip |
